description: The Paviglianiti are a 'ndrina (mafia clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in San Lorenzo, Bagaladi, and Condofuri, Calabria, Italy. Historically led by Domenico Paviglianiti, dubbed the 'boss of bosses' by the press in the 1990s. They were allied with the De Stefano clan during the Second 'Ndrangheta war. The clan has been involved in drug trafficking, extortion, corruption, and infiltration of public contracts, with numerous members arrested in recent operations.
